title: Block Myth Wukong
description: The mod is inspired by the game Black Myth Wukong, with the main part of the pack being Sun Wukong's wish-fulfilling stick designed using Blockbench.
body:
Note: Recommended to use optifine to fully experience the pack

(Currently free)

 Resource pack overview:
- The wish stick (main part of the pack) does not change texture based on the stick (mace) 
- Game interface to edit inventory bar, inventory,... 
- Environmental sound, game menu changes according to 3 music tracks of the game Black legend Wukong 
- Battle sounds, new ender dragon sounds. 
- Paid package includes: additional Gui, 4K wallpaper menu, Write as you like to upgrade the model.
If you are interested in the trial version, you can support me by purchasing the paid version (After purchasing, future upgrades will be free)
Contact for support via:
gmail: nguyentienphat2701@gmail.com
facebook: https://www.facebook.com/phat.nguyentien.148553/
youtube: [https://www.youtube.com/@PHATN_](https://www.youtube.com/@PHATN_)
- 
The stick (main part of the pack) has its texture changed based on the mace, so to use this resource pack in lower versions you can edit it yourself by: file resourcepack->assets- >minecraft->models->item and rename the original file mace.json to another game item. For example: "diamond_sword.json".
